message.content:
Review the entity, enum, RO, and VO changes in the announcement feature. Run:
`cd D:/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace/collabspace-server && git diff master...HEAD -- src/main/java/com/yottastudios/ns/collabspace/announcement/entity/ src/main/java/com/yottastudios/ns/collabspace/announcement/enums/ src/main/java/com/yottastudios/ns/collabspace/announcement/ro/ src/main/java/com/yottastudios/ns/collabspace/announcement/vo/`

Also read the full current versions of these files to understand the complete picture:
- AnnouncementEntity.java
- AnnouncementCategory.java
- AnnouncementStatus.java
- AnnouncementType.java
- CreateAnnouncementRo.java
- DeleteAnnouncementRo.java
- RepublishAnnouncementRo.java
- ActiveAnnouncementVo.java
- CreateAnnouncementVo.java
- GetListAnnouncementVo.java
- AnnouncementReadRecordEntity.java

Analyze for:
1. Are validation annotations (@NotNull, @NotBlank, etc.) properly applied on RO fields?
2. Are enums consistent and complete?
3. Are VO fields appropriate (no sensitive data leakage)?
4. Field naming consistency with project conventions
5. Any missing fields or redundant fields

Return a detailed analysis.
